query:
SELECT t.name           AS "name!",
                  COUNT(*)         AS "n!",
                  AVG(m.score)::float8 AS "avg!"
           FROM entry_tags et
           JOIN mood_entries m ON m.id = et.entry_id
           JOIN tags t         ON t.id = et.tag_id
           WHERE m.user_id = $1 AND m.created_at >= $2
           GROUP BY t.name
           ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, t.name
           LIMIT 5
